wine_restaurants.name: Venta Moncalvillo
wine_restaurants.address: Carretera de Medrano 6, 26373 Daroca de Rioja, La Rioja, Spain
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Modern Riojan with a garden-led, sustainable focus; seasonal tasting menus built around the daily harvest
wine_restaurants.description: Echapresto brothers' destination restaurant in tiny Daroca de Rioja, where sommelier Carlos keeps a 2,000-reference cellar plus house vermouth and meads.

wine_restaurants.name: El Portal de Echaurren
wine_restaurants.address: Calle Padre Jose Garcia 19, 26280 Ezcaray, La Rioja, Spain
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Creative Riojan haute cuisine rooted in tradition; Turza and Usaya tasting menus by Francis Paniego
wine_restaurants.description: Fifth-generation Paniego restaurant in Ezcaray, the first in La Rioja to win a Michelin star; a 1,000-plus-reference cellar run by sommelier Chefe Paniego.

wine_restaurants.name: Nublo
wine_restaurants.address: Plaza San Martin 5, 26200 Haro, La Rioja, Spain
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Wood-fired contemporary Riojan tasting menu by Miguel Cano in a 16th-century palace
wine_restaurants.description: Haro's first Michelin-starred restaurant, set in a 16th-century palace; diners descend into a spiral cellar of 1,000-plus Rioja references before dinner.

verified.address_quoted: Plaza San Martin, 5, 26200 Haro, La Rioja, Spain

wine_restaurants.name: Restaurante Marques de Riscal
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Basque-Riojan author cuisine by Francis Paniego; Torrea and Chirel tasting menus inside the Gehry hotel
wine_restaurants.description: Michelin-starred restaurant in the Gehry-designed City of Wine, drawing on a Riscal cellar of millions of bottles with vintages back to 1862.

wine_restaurants.name: Kiro Sushi
wine_restaurants.address: Calle Emilia Pardo Bazan 5, bajo 1, 26006 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Edomae-style sushi omakase for six diners by Felix Jimenez, Tokyo-trained
wine_restaurants.description: Six-seat Edomae sushi counter in Logrono; a Tokyo-trained ritual that, while alcohol-free, anchors the city's Michelin scene next to its Rioja tables.
wine_restaurants.tip: Only six seats and no alcohol service; book well ahead.

verified.address_quoted: C/Emilia Pardo Bazan,5 - bajo 1 Logrono (La Rioja)

wine_restaurants.name: Ikaro
wine_restaurants.address: Avenida de Portugal 3, 26001 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Author cuisine fusing La Rioja, Basque Country and Ecuador by Inaki Murua and Carolina Sanchez
wine_restaurants.description: Logrono restaurant where chefs Murua and Sanchez fuse Riojan and Ecuadorian flavours, paired from a list built around the region's wines.

verified.address_quoted: Avda. Portugal n3 bajo, Logrono, La Rioja

wine_restaurants.name: La Vieja Bodega
wine_restaurants.address: Avenida de la Rioja 17, 26230 Casalarreina, La Rioja, Spain
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Traditional Riojan grill and seasonal cuisine in a restored 17th-century wine cellar
wine_restaurants.description: Restored 17th-century cellar in Casalarreina serving Riojan grill cuisine alongside a 400-plus-reference list of Rioja and Spanish wines.

wine_restaurants.name: Tondeluna
wine_restaurants.address: Muro de Francisco de la Mata 9, 26001 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Modern Riojan gastrobar by Francis Paniego with communal tables and an Echaurren-rooted menu
wine_restaurants.description: Francis Paniego's Logrono gastrobar near Gran Via, pairing Echaurren-style Riojan dishes with a wine list fit for the regional capital.

verified.address_quoted: Muro de Francisco de la Mata, 9, 26001 Logrono, La Rioja

wine_restaurants.name: El Rincon del Vino
wine_restaurants.address: Calle Marques de San Nicolas 136, 26001 Logrono, La Rioja, Spain
wine_restaurants.cuisine: Traditional Riojan grill in a former winery; charcoal meats and seasonal produce with sommelier-guided wine
wine_restaurants.description: Grill restaurant in one of Logrono's first wineries, with a vaulted brick dining room and a sommelier-curated Rioja list of 350-plus references.

verified.address_quoted: Calle Marques de San Nicolas, 136, 26001 Logrono
